name: Vertex Pharmaceuticals
analysis: VRTX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at $456.6800. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $458.9900, stop $415.8099, target $507.9200 (1.13:1) — then trail it.
